title: Sara, Eva & The Magic Sandy Forest!
logline: Eva swears soccer is easier than tennis (you just kick the ball!). The family signs Eva up at the YMCA, then road-trips through a sandy magic forest to a 50s-style drive-in burger spot. They stop at Wawa for snacks, spot a pink-hollow magic-creature tree, get rocked by a wave-bumpy road, and then get LOST. The girls climb on the Jeep roof and spot an ancient glowing magic deer who leads them past a pond full of fish out of the forest. They arrive at Weber Drive-In where a roller-skating carhop delivers burgers and shakes through the car window. Tag: Eva pivots to wanting tennis tomorrow — calling next week's adventure.
formulaReference: Bluey-style 'kid-led adventure with discovery' family episode — confident-kid hook → activity signup → scenic detour with snack stop → wonder/awe (pink tree, hidden creatures) → mild crisis (lost) → kid-led pivot (roof + magic deer) → resolution (pond + fish out) → reward (drive-in food) → cliffhanger.
durationTotal: ~7:41 (20 normal × 10s = 200s + A 60s + B 60s + C 90s + intro 31s + outro 20s)
expectedCreditsBreakdown: 20 normal clips × 90 cr = 1800 + 3 render specs (A,B,C) × 90 cr = 270 → 2070 cr base; +25% buffer ≈ 2588 cr realistic ceiling. NOTE: above ep09's 1980 base by 90 cr (one extra music render with native audio on, per fix to lesson_kling_omni_pipeline_fixes ep09 B-render note).

Mango cup + blueberry shake props side-by-side on counter — beat 8 prop reference
Sandy NJ-Pinelands-style pine forest, dappled light — beats 9, 11, 12, 14, 15, 16
Pine tree with a tall PINK-painted hollow opening (fairy-creature door) — beat 10, render B
Ancient stag with oversized antlers and faint blue-glow aura — beats 15, 16, 17
Woodland pond with fish ripples and mossy banks — beat 17
Orange wood-paneled walk-up drive-in storefront with white columns and 'DRIVE-IN' sign — beats 18, 19
Drive-in food tray clipped to a Jeep window with two milkshakes + burgers — beats 19, 20

outro.note: 0_song.mp4 sorts last via parseInt-Infinity hack — keep (memory rule #23)

music.policy: ALL music is Suno — Kling renders dialogue + ambient ONLY. No music phrases inside any clip prompt (memory rule #24).

arc.name: HOOK — Eva's tennis-soccer zinger
arc.purpose: Eva declares soccer is easier. Confident-kid hook.

arc.name: YMCA gym — Eva tries soccer
arc.purpose: Eva already on the gym floor with a ball; Sara watches.

arc.name: Signup desk
arc.purpose: Mama signs Eva up. Eva grinning.

arc.name: Eva's first big kick
arc.purpose: Eva kicks ball — flies high. Sara: 'See? Easy!' tag.

arc.name: 🎵 MUSIC VIDEO A — Kick the Ball (60s)
arc.purpose: Render A under 'Kick the Ball' — duo dance high-energy soccer fever.

arc.name: Driveway packing
arc.purpose: Mama loading cooler. Sara now has the soccer ball; Eva brings tennis racket 'just in case' (callback reversal).

arc.name: Pulling out of the driveway
arc.purpose: Jeep cabin — Mama at wheel, kids buckled, all excited about magic-forest adventure.

arc.name: Wawa coffee + snacks
arc.purpose: Mama at coffee bar, kids at snack wall.

arc.name: Mango + blueberry shake
arc.purpose: Sara holds mango cup. Eva 'YAMMY BLUBERY SHAKE!' Sara correction.

arc.name: Entering magic forest
arc.purpose: Jeep on sandy forest road, towering pines. Excited adventure mood.

arc.name: The pink creature tree
arc.purpose: Sara sees pink-hollow tree. 'A magic creature lives there!'

arc.name: Family forest selfie (4 chars, tight framing)
arc.purpose: Papa selfie-style framing with Mama+Sara+Eva squished in. License plate visible behind reads SARA AND EVA.

arc.name: Bumpy wave road + strange noises
arc.purpose: Jeep rocks on bumps. Eva hand cupped to ear: 'Did you hear that?!' Adventure-excited not scared.

arc.name: 🎵 MUSIC VIDEO B — Pink Tree Whisper (60s slow-mo)
arc.purpose: Render B under 'Pink Tree Whisper' — Eva solo wonder at the pink-hollow tree.

arc.name: LOST — Mama checks phone
arc.purpose: Jeep stopped. Mama looks at phone confused. No panic — adventure mood.

arc.name: Girls on the roof
arc.purpose: Sara + Eva on Jeep hood, hands shielding eyes, scanning forest.

arc.name: Spotting the magic deer
arc.purpose: Reverse POV: ancient glowing magic deer between trees.

arc.name: Following the deer
arc.purpose: Jeep creeping slowly behind deer through trees.

arc.name: Pond + fish (deer leads)
arc.purpose: Deer reaches pond. Fish swim downstream pointing the way out.

arc.name: Weber arrival
arc.purpose: Jeep pulls into orange-paneled drive-in lot. Wide.

arc.name: 🎵 MUSIC VIDEO C — Burgers in the Car (90s)
arc.purpose: Render C under 'Burgers in the Car' — duo dance 50s sock-hop with shakes/burgers.

arc.name: Roller-skate carhop delivers
arc.purpose: Carhop on skates clips tray onto Jeep window. Sara: 'Burgers in the CAR?!' Eva: 'Best day EVER!'

arc.name: CLIFFHANGER — Eva pivots to tennis
arc.purpose: Family eats off tray. Eva: 'Soccer practice TOMORROW?' Sara: 'YEP. And we're bringing TENNIS rackets too — just in case!' Setup for next ep.

arc.name: OUTRO (reused)
arc.purpose: Subscribe pair from season_01/OUTRO/ — 17.mp4 → 18.mp4 → 0_song.mp4 last.

rules.klingPromptMustNotContainReason: All music is Suno-mixed in assemble (memory rule #24).
rules.motionTowardForbidden: No 'walks in/toward', 'approaches', 'moves to(ward)', 'heads to/in', 'walks up' — these spawn duplicates when another character is anchored. Use static placement only. (memory: lesson_kling_motion_verbs_duplicate.md)
rules.max3ForegroundChars: Hard cap 3 foreground-anchored characters per clip. CLIP 11 IS THE EXPLICIT EXCEPTION — user-approved 4-character close-up selfie framing (zero BG space for ghosts to spawn).
rules.negativePromptRequired: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, second mother, two Papa, two Mama, identical adults, extra people, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, mirror reflection, family members in the background, additional children, extra child in background, second blonde child, ghost figure, shadow of person
rules.characterNamesInDialogue: Drop the bound character's name from other characters' dialogue (memory: rule from ep01).
